name: mindstorms-cloud-controller
description: GCP Cloud Functions for controlling Mindstorms robot over IP

scripts.deploy: gcloud functions deploy controlRobot --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --region europe-central2 --set-env-vars ROBOT_HOST=${ROBOT_HOST},ROBOT_PORT=${ROBOT_PORT},API_KEY=${API_KEY}
scripts.deploy:telemetry: gcloud functions deploy telemetryIngestion --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --region europe-central2 --set-env-vars API_KEY=${API_KEY},BIGQUERY_PROJECT_ID=${BIGQUERY_PROJECT_ID},BIGQUERY_DATASET=${BIGQUERY_DATASET}
